heading: Special Drawing Rights
label: 286n Special Drawing Rights
text: The President is hereby authorized (a) to accept the amendment to the articles of agreement of the International Monetary Fund (hereinafter referred to as the “Fund”), attached to the April 1968 report by the Executive Directors to the Board of Governors of the Fund, for the purpose of (i) establishing a facility based on Special Drawing Rights in the Fund and (ii) giving effect to certain modifications in the present rules and practices of the Fund, and (b) to participate in the special drawing account established by the amendment.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Bretton Woods Agreement Act, which comprises this subchapter.act July 31, 1945, ch. 33959 Stat. 512

Short Title, , , provided:Pub. L. 90–349, § 182 Stat. 188June 19, 1968“That this Act [enacting this section and sections 286 to 286r of this title and amending sections 412, 415, 417, and 467 of Title 12, Banks and Banking] may be cited as the ‘Special Drawing Rights Act’.”o
